welcomeSteps.title: Bookmark this Page!
welcomeSteps.text: Press Ctrl + D (or Cmd + D) to save this page so you can easily return to the portal later.

welcomeSteps.title: Use the Sidebar!
welcomeSteps.text:
The menu lives on the left.

Click the Star Icon at the top to Minimize/Maximize the menu.

The UP arrow puts the sidebar into Mini Mode
